marketBaseline.note: A_MULTIBOOK_LIVE (fallback A); 4 independent books, de-vigged per book before combining

exploration.label: EXPLORATION — creative, capped, prospectively graded, unproven. Separate from the frozen v7.0.0 core.

primaryDrivers: a single analyst is the only source

limitations: every claim comes from a single analyst — no independent check is possible
